phases.label: Gather Preferences
phases.description: Collect travel requirements from the user (destination, dates, budget, group info, interests, etc.)

phases.label: Shortlist Destinations
phases.description: Research and shortlist 8-10 destinations matching the user's preferences

phases.label: Select Destinations
phases.description: Present the shortlisted destinations and let the user choose which ones to explore

phases.label: Research Experiences
phases.description: Find activities and experiences at the selected destinations that match preferences

phases.label: Plan Itinerary
phases.description: Build a day-by-day itinerary slotting places and activities

phases.label: Research Accommodation & Flights
phases.description: Research places to stay and flight options for the trip

phases.label: Final Plan
phases.description: Present the complete, detailed travel plan with all details

destination_research.name: Athens
destination_research.description: The heart of Ancient Greece. Perfect for mythology (Acropolis, Temple of Olympian Zeus) and history. The Acropolis Museum is very family-friendly.
The largest Greek island, home to the Palace of Knossos (Minotaur's labyrinth legend). Incredible beaches like Elafonisi (pink sand) and shallow waters perfect for a 4-year-old.
destination_research.name: Crete (Heraklion/Chania)

destination_research.description: Famous for its Medieval Old Town (UNESCO) and the Colossus of Rhodes legend. Great beaches and the Valley of the Butterflies which a 4-year-old would love.
destination_research.name: Rhodes

destination_research.description: The greenest island. Venetian influence, beautiful old town, and shallow, calm beaches like Paleokastritsa. History and mythology (Achilleion Palace) are prominent.
destination_research.name: Corfu
Naxos
destination_research.description: The greenest island. Venetian influence, beautiful old town, and shallow, calm beaches like Paleokastritsa. History and mythology (Achilleion Palace) are prominent.
Gateway to the Temple of Poseidon at Sounion (stunning sunsets and mythology). Close to Athens, offering a beach-resort feel without leaving the mainland.
destination_research.name: Athens Riviera (Sounion/Glyfada)
Nafplio
destination_research.description: Peloponnese region. First capital of modern Greece, very close to Epidaurus and Mycenae (crucial for history/mythology fans). Charming streets and nearby sandy beaches.
Santorini's quieter neighbor. Incredible beaches, easy pace, and rich in history with the Portara (Temple of Apollo) right at the harbor.
destination_research.name: Naxos
